are talking about Krishna, you are saying he is great, he is this thing, he danced with
Gopis, something similar to what happened with the Dehrasoda, how can he be God?
He is breaking his promises, he is stealing butter, that's why Krishna says Janma Karma
Chame Divyam, Divyam means divine.
What meets the eye, what we see is not the truth.
One who understands that Janma Karma Chame Divyam, evam yo veti tattvata, one who understands
in truth, tyaktva deham, after he gives up this body, na eti so eti arjuna, he doesn't
get birth again in this world.
